step description: Insert the diaphragm into the top chamber of the carburetor body.
Place the spring into the diaphragm inside the carburetor body.
Position the cover over the spring on the top of the carburetor body and secure it with screws using a screwdriver.
Attach the float bowl to the bottom of the carburetor body and secure it using screws and a screwdriver.
Install the throttle stop screw onto the side of the carburetor body using a screwdriver.
